message: uv run python -c "import os,pathlib; from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download('cocktailpeanut/stable-audio-3-small-music'); h=pathlib.Path(os.environ.get('HF_HOME') or os.path.expanduser('~/.cache/huggingface'))/'hub'; s=h/'models--cocktailpeanut--stable-audio-3-small-music'; d=h/'models--stabilityai--stable-audio-3-small-music'; (s.rename(d) if s.exists() and not d.exists() else None)"
